languages.original_text: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

languages.text: "Идира, будь добра, демонстрируй свою трактовку правил вежливости и воспитания с меньшим энтузиазмом. Господин генетор Эоганн — ценный союзник и гость Лорд-капитана".

"Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

"Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

languages.text: 「イディラ、礼儀作法の解釈をどうしても示したいのなら、熱意を少し抑えてください。ジェネトル・フェブルス大佐は、我らの貴重な同盟者であり、艦長殿の貴賓です」
languages.original_text: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「イディラ、礼儀作法の解釈をどうしても示したいのなら、熱意を少し抑えてください。ジェネトル・フェブルス大佐は、我らの貴重な同盟者であり、艦長殿の貴賓です。」

languages.text: « Idira, si vous tenez vraiment à faire valoir votre interprétation personnelle des règles de politesse et de courtoisie, je vous prierais de le faire avec moins d'enthousiasme. Le maître genetor Februs est un allié très estimé ainsi qu'un invité de marque {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « Idira, si vous tenez vraiment à faire valoir votre interprétation personnelle des règles de politesse et de courtoisie, je vous prierais de le faire avec moins d'enthousiasme. Le maître genetor Februs est un allié très estimé ainsi qu'un invité de marque {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: "Idira, wenn Ihr schon Eure persönliche Interpretation von Höflichkeit und Manieren präsentieren müsst, dann bitte mit etwas weniger Begeisterung. Meister Genetor Februs ist ein wertvoller Verbündeter und Gast des Lord Captains."
languages.original_text: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

languages.text: "İdira, nezaket ve görgü kurallarına dair kişisel yorumunu sunmak zorundaysan lütfen bunu daha hevessizce yap. Üstat Genetör Februs, Lord Kaptan'ın değerli bir müttefiki ve konuğudur."
languages.original_text: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "İdira, nezaket ve görgü kurallarına dair kişisel yorumunu sunmak zorundaysan lütfen bunu daha hevessizce yap. Üstat Genetör Februs, Lord Kaptan'ın değerli bir müttefiki ve konuğudur."

languages.text: «Idira, si insiste en exhibir su particular interpretación de los modales y las normas de cortesía, le ruego que al menos reprima su entusiasmo. El maese genetor Februs es un aliado valioso y está aquí como invitado {mf|del|de la} Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «Idira, si insiste en exhibir su particular interpretación de los modales y las normas de cortesía, le ruego que al menos reprima su entusiasmo. El maese genetor Februs es un aliado valioso y está aquí como invitado {mf|del|de la} Lord Capitán».

languages.text: “伊迪拉，如果你非要展示自己对礼貌和规矩的个人理解，也麻烦你悠着点儿。基因士大师费布鲁斯是舰长大人重要的盟友与座上宾。”
languages.original_text: "Idira, if you must demonstrate your personal interpretation of the rules of courtesy and manners, please do so with less enthusiasm. Master Genetor Februs is a valued ally and guest of the Lord Captain."
